title: autobench.population.summary v1
description: End-of-cycle summary of a multi-advocate RSI run. One event per population cycle naming the winning advocate plus the best score every advocate reached. The bus envelope's `data.session_id` correlates the summary to the dispatcher; per-advocate session_ids appear inside `advocates[].session_id`. Phase 1 of the wire-pop epic — nervous-bus-6yut. Source: /autobench.

session_id.description: Bus session_id of the summary emitter (the population coordinator, not any single advocate). Typically of the form 'pop-<cycle_id>'.

cycle_id.description: ULID identifying this population cycle. Distinct from any advocate's session_id.

advocates.description: Per-advocate summaries. Index in this array does NOT have to match the numeric suffix in advocate_id — consumers should key on advocate_id, not position.

session_id.description: Per-advocate bus session_id — correlates this advocate to its iteration / sandbox / improver events.

final_score.description: Best aggregate_score this advocate reached across all iterations. May be negative when no iteration completed (sentinel).

best_iter.description: Iteration index that produced final_score. -1 when no iteration completed.

diversity_score.description: Optional (Phase 2, nervous-bus-bo86). Mean pairwise lineage SACS-distance to sibling advocates this cycle. 0.0 = fully convergent with siblings; 1.0 = fully divergent. Absent on Phase-1 emitters.

adjusted_score.description: Optional (Phase 2, nervous-bus-bo86). best_score rescaled by the cross-advocate diversity bonus: best_score * (1 + diversity_weight * (diversity_score - 0.5)). When diversity_weight == 0 this equals final_score.

winner_id.description: advocate_id of the highest raw best_score advocate. Ties broken by lowest advocate index (deterministic / replayable). Phase-1 winner-selection semantics, preserved for replay parity.

winner_score.description: Winner's best aggregate_score (raw, before diversity adjustment).

adjusted_winner_id.description: Optional (Phase 2, nervous-bus-bo86). advocate_id of the highest *adjusted_score* lineage — the operational winner that downstream cross-cycle promotion will key on. Equal to winner_id when diversity_weight == 0 or both selections coincide. Absent on Phase-1 emitters.

diversity_weight.description: Optional (Phase 2, nervous-bus-bo86). Penalty weight used to compute adjusted_score. Default 0.10; 0.0 disables the diversity bonus and forces adjusted_winner_id == winner_id.

cycle_started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the first advocate began.

cycle_ended_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the last advocate finished.
